final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing employee ID card for "字节跳动" (ByteDance) — front and back views (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a photorealistic corporate ID card aesthetic — exact card stock and finish are yours
Composition: must include front side and back side of the ID card visible
Subject: must include "字节跳动" brand identity as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a realistic studio lighting atmosphere — exact light source placement is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs realistic plastic/card material treatment — exact surface texture and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "字节跳动" and related employee ID card text elements
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must show both front and back sides of the ID card
Avoid:
